assertions.text: AI reads the provided docs and summarizes project state without asking user to explain it
assertions.evidence: AI opens with a structured project summary (Orbit, stack, rhythm, last known state, what's next) without asking the user any context questions

assertions.text: AI breaks the refresh interval task into numbered steps and asks for confirmation
assertions.evidence: AI presents a 4-step numbered checklist (decide intervals, store preference, wire timer, add UI) and explicitly asks 'Confirm the list and I'll start from step 1'

assertions.text: AI does not propose a backend or remote sync feature (would conflict with T-2)
assertions.evidence: AI only mentions UserDefaults for storage — local persistence, consistent with T-2 (no backend). No mention of remote sync or server-side storage.

assertions.text: AI first response does not ask what the project is or what has been done
assertions.evidence: First paragraph is a project state summary (not questions). AI asks only task-specific questions (where should the UI appear? what intervals?) not project context questions.
